backup.full_text:
Useful tip to cut time-to-first-token on longer prompts in the API: pre-warm the prompt cache.

Send your system prompt before the user prompt. Claude writes it to the cache, but skips generating any output.

When the real user request lands, it'll hit a warm cache. https://t.co/6BdEzbamr2
backup.summary: Claude API提示：使用提示缓存预热可降低长提示的首token延迟。先发送系统提示到缓存，用户请求时命中热缓存。
angles: Claude API性能优化秘诀：提示缓存预热
开发者必知：如何降低API首token延迟
Claude效率翻倍的隐藏技巧
